trigger: PowerShell blocked unsigned license_acceptance.ps1 after AV-safe RemoteSigned entry point
External Windows retest: unsigned tools/license_acceptance.ps1 still blocked although no Zone.Identifier stream was found; local policy requires stronger no--File launch path.
External Windows retest of 2.13.4G passed the inline PowerShell host gate, then failed under StrictMode because Add-SetupResult used $script:Rows while setup_repository.ps1 initialized only $Rows.
root_cause: PowerShell -File creates a script scope for unscoped $Rows; inline ScriptBlock execution under -Command does not give the same binding, so $script:Rows was undefined.
repair: Initialize Rows ledgers as $script:Rows in setup_repository.ps1, choco_bootstrap.ps1, gh_deploy.ps1, and register_with_seed.ps1; serialize from $script:Rows where applicable.
